If tests fail, investigate and fix the underlying issue — do not just update snapshots without understanding the failure.

2026-04-24T22:37:27.8609036Z    Leave all other fields unchanged.
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8609671Z 
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8610072Z 2. **Run SDK generation** from the repo root:
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8611325Z    ```bash
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8612597Z    npx tsp-client update --tsp-location sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/tsp-location.yaml
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8614169Z    ```
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8614984Z    If the `azsdk` CLI is available, you may also use:
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8616721Z    ```bash
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8617558Z    azsdk generate sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8618625Z    ```
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8618991Z 
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8619348Z 3. **Commit all generated changes**  
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8620613Z    Include both `tsp-location.yaml` and all generated source files.
2026-04-24T22:37:27.8621552Z
